text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, February 08. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the telemetry feeds. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
